custom_rules.name: Block SQL Injection
custom_rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "union select") or (http.request.uri.query contains "drop table") or (http.request.uri.query contains "insert into") or (http.request.uri.query contains "delete from") or (http.request.uri.query contains "' or 1=1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "' or '1'='1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "admin'--") or (http.request.body contains "union select") or (http.request.body contains "drop table")

custom_rules.name: Block XSS Attempts
custom_rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "<script") or (http.request.uri.query contains "javascript:") or (http.request.uri.query contains "onerror=") or (http.request.uri.query contains "onload=") or (http.request.uri.query contains "<iframe") or (http.request.body contains "<script") or (http.request.body contains "javascript:")

custom_rules.name: Block Path Traversal
custom_rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "../") or (http.request.uri.path contains "..\\") or (http.request.uri.query contains "../") or (http.request.uri.query contains "..\\")

custom_rules.name: Protect API Endpoints
custom_rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/") and (((http.request.method eq "POST") and (not any(lower(http.request.headers.names[*])[*] eq "content-type"))) or ((not http.user_agent contains "Mozilla") and (not http.user_agent contains "okhttp") and (not http.user_agent contains "axios")))
